problems_encountered.description: MCP tools not available in current agent execution context. Running in eval/results directory without access to mittwald MCP server's tool calling interface. tool_response_summary: Tool not executed. Expected behavior: Would call DELETE /v2/organization-invites/{inviteId} API endpoint via revokeOrgInvite() library function, revoking a pending organization invitation. Requires confirm=true parameter as safety check for this destructive operation.
execution_notes: Tool handler requires inviteId parameter and MUST have confirm=true to proceed (destructive operation guard). Logs warning before execution. Validates session token, calls library function, returns revoked: true on success. Would require an invite ID from org-invite-list. This is a destructive write operation. Cannot execute without MCP tool access.
